Malachite Charm Amulet

Once every 7 sec., the amulet's owner and 2 nearest allied units gain a shield that blocks 320000 damage of any type and exists up to 3 sec. When the shield is removed or its duration ends, the unit that had the shield restores 20% health.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Sage bot code: AM276

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 7 secs
